Knockout Bracket

Ordered by current standings (FIFA 2026 rules). As of 2026-06-27 JST · unofficial

Full 32-match knockout bracket. Real teams fill each slot once groups are decided (resolved group by group; unresolved slots keep their seed label). Times are JST; scores / penalties appear after each match. Scroll sideways for all rounds.

🥉 Race for the 8 best third places

Of the 12 third-placed teams, the top 8 (two-thirds) reach the knockout; the bottom 4 are out. Only Group B is decided so far — the rest are live (the third-placed team itself can still change on Matchday 3, finishing 6/26). Ordered by FIFA rules [points → GD → goals → fair play]; MP = matches played (fewer = more to come).

#GrpTeamMPPtsGDGF
1F🇸🇪Sweden34+07set
2E🇪🇨Ecuador34+02set
3B🇧🇦Bosnia34-15set
4D🇵🇾Paraguay34-22set
5I🇸🇳Senegal33+28set
6L🇭🇷Croatia23-13live
7A🇰🇷Korea33-12set
8J🇩🇿Algeria23-22live
Top 8 advance — cut line
9C🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿Scotland33-31set
10G🇧🇪Belgium22+01live
11H🇺🇾Uruguay32-13set
12K🇨🇩DR Congo21-11live

Results cross-checked against FIFA and major outlets (2+ sources). Tiebreak = FIFA 2026 rules (head-to-head [points → GD → goals] → overall GD → overall goals → fair-play points → FIFA Ranking; drawing of lots abolished). This is an unofficial personal fan page, not affiliated with FIFA.
